execution.event_queue: Authority, Git, validator, publisher, and independent-reader events are FIFO per attempt; effects return new typed events and never synchronously re-enter the reducer.
execution.run_to_completion: One event is reduced atomically against one attempt version; state, one-time authorization consumption, and requested outbox effects share the same transaction.
execution.action_order: Validate event source and schema, enforce attempt and effect correlation, select transition, evaluate pure guards, apply declared context_updates, atomically persist state and outbox intents, then dispatch typed effects.
execution.context_update_semantics: context_updates is the complete reducer-owned mutation set for an accepted transition; event.X copies an authenticated payload field and increment:N adds N with overflow and configured-budget checks.
execution.event_routing: Every event.attempt_id must equal configuration.attempt_id before transition selection; source metadata is authenticated by the named port adapter.

publish_approval.replay: An exact token replay after consumption is rejected; the same approval_hash with a different canonical envelope is a security conflict; reauthorization after REF_READ_OLD requires a fresh globally unused nonce and a different approval_hash.

PUBLISH_AUTHORIZED.source: LeaseAuthority and ProtectedRefPolicy after fresh SQLite readback; the adapter authenticates authority_observed_at and enforces global nonce uniqueness

INTERRUPT_RECORDED.source: external interrupt controller after durable cancel, timeout, or budget request

receipt_matches_candidate.predicate: All identity fields equal configuration and receipt_hash equals the SHA-256 of their canonical validation-receipt envelope.

authorization_matches_attempt.predicate: The immutable receipt and attempt identity equals configuration; the source-authenticated authority epoch is not older than configuration; expiry is later than authority_observed_at; expected_old_sha equals base_sha; new_commit_sha equals candidate_commit_sha; publish_effect_id equals the canonical publish_effect digest; approval_schema_version is publish_authorization/v1; and approval_hash equals the canonical one-time publish_approval envelope. The authenticated adapter proves nonce is globally unused. authorization_status must be none, or invalidated with both a different approval_hash and nonce from the prior token; consumed tokens and exact replays are rejected.

cas_report_matches_intent.predicate: The publisher report identifies the exact persisted effect and immutable CAS arguments.

readback_matches_receipt.predicate: The independent reader observed the exact candidate commit and tree for the same publish effect.

readback_is_expected_old.predicate: The independent reader observed the exact expected-old SHA for the same publish effect.

readback_is_other_for_effect.predicate: The effect id matches and observed_ref_sha equals neither expected_old_sha nor candidate_commit_sha.

finalization_matches_publication.predicate: The complete publication identity matches, released_fence_set_digest equals fence_set_digest, task_state is MERGED, both pending interrupt values are none, and finalization_receipt_hash equals the canonical connect_finalization_receipt/v1 envelope.

finalization_after_cancel_matches_public.predicate: The complete publication identity matches, released_fence_set_digest equals fence_set_digest, task_state is MERGED, both pending interrupt values equal cancel, and finalization_receipt_hash equals the canonical connect_finalization_receipt/v1 envelope.

finalization_after_timeout_matches_publi.predicate: The complete publication identity matches, released_fence_set_digest equals fence_set_digest, task_state is MERGED, both pending interrupt values equal timeout, and finalization_receipt_hash equals the canonical connect_finalization_receipt/v1 envelope.

finalization_after_budget_matches_public.predicate: The complete publication identity matches, released_fence_set_digest equals fence_set_digest, task_state is MERGED, both pending interrupt values equal budget_exhausted, and finalization_receipt_hash equals the canonical connect_finalization_receipt/v1 envelope.

retry_exhaustion_due.predicate: The scope matches the active state, observed_retries equals its durable counter, and that counter is at least its configured maximum.

pending_interrupt_accepted.predicate: No interrupt is pending or the new interrupt_kind equals the already-pending kind; conflicting interrupts reject and audit.

safety_properties.statement: FINALIZED requires the authoritative ref to equal candidate_commit_sha and that commit to resolve to candidate_tree_sha from a green receipt binding the complete attempt identity tuple.
safety_properties.verification: Payload-driven guard truth tables, same-tree/wrong-commit negative trace, independent Git readback, and production differential tests.

safety_properties.statement: A one-time authorization is consumed with durable PUBLISH_INTENT before ApplyExpectedOldRefCAS can be dispatched.
safety_properties.verification: Transactional outbox test plus kill-before-intent, kill-after-intent, and duplicate-delivery fault tests.

safety_properties.statement: A publisher success report never reaches FINALIZING without an independent authoritative commit-and-tree readback.
safety_properties.verification: Trace reachability check, producer/readback contradiction test, and cross-contract validator.

safety_properties.statement: Authorization and receipt bind the complete fence-set digest and a fresh authority snapshot, never a caller-echoed singular fence.
safety_properties.verification: Stale fence-set, coordinator-epoch, replay, and authority-source negative tests.

safety_properties.statement: Cancellation, timeout, or budget exhaustion after publish intent is recorded and reconciled into FINALIZED_CANCELED, FINALIZED_TIMED_OUT, or FINALIZED_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED; it cannot undo a landed ref or project a published Task away from MERGED.
safety_properties.verification: Deferred-interrupt traces around every effect-critical state and typed finalization receipt checks.

safety_properties.statement: Intent acknowledgement, CAS report, independent readback, and finalization all carry the exact publish_effect_id and immutable arguments authorized for the attempt.
safety_properties.verification: Guard-false traces for intent, CAS, readback, and finalization correlation plus production differential replay.

liveness_properties.statement: Every admitted attempt eventually reaches a final state, TIMED_OUT, or NEEDS_REPAIR.
assumptions: Effect workers eventually return a typed result or a bounded unknown result.
Reconciliation retry and no-progress budgets are finite.
The integration ref remains readable or repair authority intervenes.
liveness_properties.verification: Bounded model check, deadline guard boundary tests, no-progress exhaustion, restart traces, and fault injection at every publish cut point.

conformance.implementation_step: The FSM is the semantic SSOT. Bind pure guards to payload comparisons and source-authenticated events; bind effects to durable ports and project the execution loop explicitly.
conformance.model_trace_runner: SYMPOSIUM SKILLS/fsm-design/scripts/run_fsm_traces.py provides structural transition and guard coverage; a planned payload-driven runner must compute guards from fixtures rather than trust booleans.
conformance.contract_tests: Run every transition, every guard true and false, invalid event, same-tree wrong-commit, authority replay, duplicate effect, deadline boundary, deferred interrupt, ref readback class, and finalization receipt against both model and production reducer.
